trash_escalation_threshold.note: ratio threshold requires two consecutive audits; absolute trashed count threshold is immediate

if_retire_active_duplicates_now.reason: would increase trashed count from 396 to 406 and cross the 400-item escalation threshold before any purge window

recommended_order: owner cleanup window: permanently delete redundant trashed copies first
then soft-delete exact-content loser actives to trash
then rerun vaultwarden.vault.audit and duplicate/trash decision report
